## Checklist

- [ ] `bundle exec jekyll build` completes without errors
- [ ] Verified in light **and** dark mode
- [ ] Tested at mobile width (≤640px) if layout changed
- [ ] Uses CSS custom properties (no hardcoded colors)
- [ ] New config options documented in `_config.yml` comments and README
